summary: After-hours inbound voice lead. Jessica is interested in porcelain veneers for the top front teeth ahead of her wedding in ~6 weeks, wants a natural look for photos, asked about financing, and stated she is ready to book a consult. High-value, hard-deadline, financing-ready — a hot lead.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling BrightSmile Aesthetics, this is Ava, our after-hours assistant. How can I help you tonight?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Hi! I'm interested in veneers. I have a wedding coming up in about six weeks and I wanted to know if it's even possible in time, and whether you offer financing.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Congratulations on the wedding! Veneers before then is absolutely doable — the process usually takes two to three visits over about three weeks. Are you thinking a full smile, around eight to ten teeth, or just the front few?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Probably the top front ones, however many show when I smile. I want it to look really natural for the photos.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, that's exactly what we specialize in. And on financing — we offer 0% APR for 18 months on cosmetic treatment, so you can spread it out. Would mornings or afternoons work better for a consult this week?

transcript.speaker: lead
transcript.text: Oh that's great. Afternoons are better for me. Honestly if it can be done in time I'm ready to book a consult.

score.label: hot
score.urgency_reasoning: Hard event deadline in 6 weeks on a flagship cosmetic service, with the caller explicitly ready to book — every hour of delay risks losing a multi-thousand-dollar case to a competitor.

clinic_context_hits.label: Financing
clinic_context_hits.value: CareCredit/Cherry, 0% APR 18 months on cosmetic over $2,000

clinic_context_hits.label: Insurance
clinic_context_hits.value: Cosmetic not covered — financing is the affordability path

clinic_context_hits.label: Premium lead rule
clinic_context_hits.value: Hard deadline <8wk + flagship service + financing intent = HOT

clinic_context_hits.label: Escalation policy
clinic_context_hits.value: Hot -> alert front-desk + callback within 30 min

actions.label: Consulted BrightSmile policy: services, financing, premium-lead rules

next_best_action.recommendation: Call Jessica back within 30 minutes tonight. Lead with: yes, it can be done in time. Offer the earliest afternoon consult this week and mention 0% financing as a convenience. Hold a Saturday slot as backup.
next_best_action.draft_followup: Hi Jessica! It's Ava from BrightSmile Aesthetics — congratulations again on the wedding! Great news: a natural-looking veneer smile is absolutely achievable in your 6-week window. I'd love to get you in for a consult this week — I have afternoon openings Wednesday and Thursday. And to keep it easy, cosmetic treatment can be spread over 18 months at 0% APR. Want me to hold Thursday at 2:00pm for you? — The BrightSmile Aesthetics Team
